title: Applause and Boo

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
two single or multi-message switches
record:
clapping on one switch 
"boo" on the other

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. Invite the switch user to be the judge of jokes, dancing or anything funny. 
2. Perform your joke, dance, or talent. 
3.The switch user presses a switch to respond with either a round of applause or a boo.

tooltipText: Use 2 switches to give a round of applause or boo
